DFIntAssetResolutionWorkflowTelemetryFai.mechanism: Limits the frequency of telemetry events related to asset resolution failures.
DFIntAssetResolutionWorkflowTelemetryFai.purpose: Helps reduce server load and improves performance by managing how often failure events are reported.

DFFlagSimGizmoConstRef2_Staged.mechanism: Enables a new reference system for simulation gizmos in the development environment.
DFFlagSimGizmoConstRef2_Staged.purpose: Provides developers with better tools for creating and manipulating game elements, enhancing the building experience.

DFFlagRCCInstanceTrackingIncludeRsl.mechanism: Includes additional tracking for certain instances in the Roblox engine.
DFFlagRCCInstanceTrackingIncludeRsl.purpose: Improves the accuracy of instance tracking, which can lead to better performance and debugging for developers.

FFlagLuauCodegenDwordSpillSlots_Staged.mechanism: Adjusts how the Luau scripting engine handles memory allocation for certain data types.
FFlagLuauCodegenDwordSpillSlots_Staged.purpose: Optimizes memory usage in scripts, potentially leading to smoother gameplay for players.

FFlagInitResourceBBoxForPartsToo.mechanism: Initializes bounding boxes for parts in a more efficient manner.
FFlagInitResourceBBoxForPartsToo.purpose: Enhances the performance of parts in games, leading to improved rendering and interaction for players.

DFFlagCatchAsyncConvexDecompErrors.mechanism: Catches errors during the processing of complex shapes in real-time.
DFFlagCatchAsyncConvexDecompErrors.purpose: Improves game stability by preventing crashes when handling complex object shapes.

FFlagTopBarSignalizeMenuOpen_Staged.mechanism: Adds visual indicators on the top bar when menus are opened.
FFlagTopBarSignalizeMenuOpen_Staged.purpose: Enhances user experience by making it clear when menus are active.

FFlagEnablePartyPageCarouselExperimentat.mechanism: Tests a new layout for the party page with a carousel feature.
FFlagEnablePartyPageCarouselExperimentat.purpose: Provides a more engaging way for players to browse and join parties.

FFlagBasePartScopedScriptRestriction.mechanism: Restricts certain scripts to specific parts in the game.
FFlagBasePartScopedScriptRestriction.purpose: Increases security and performance by limiting script access to only necessary parts.

DFFlagEnableLuaApiToRegisterEncryptedAss.mechanism: Allows developers to register encrypted assets with a filter for specific places.
DFFlagEnableLuaApiToRegisterEncryptedAss.purpose: Enhances asset security and management for developers, ensuring only authorized places can use them.

FFlagAXCatalogSearchSupportUUID2_Staged.mechanism: Enhances the search functionality in the catalog using unique identifiers.
FFlagAXCatalogSearchSupportUUID2_Staged.purpose: Improves the accuracy and speed of searching for items in the catalog.

FFlagAXItemCardSelectedOverlayBorderInst.mechanism: Changes the visual indication of selected items from a checkmark to a border overlay.
FFlagAXItemCardSelectedOverlayBorderInst.purpose: Makes it clearer which items are selected when browsing.

FFlagAdjustAudioLoaderThreadCount_Staged.mechanism: Modifies the number of threads used to load audio files.
FFlagAdjustAudioLoaderThreadCount_Staged.purpose: Enhances audio loading performance, resulting in smoother gameplay.

FFlagAXMISExposureLogging_IXP.mechanism: Implements logging for monitoring exposure to various features.
FFlagAXMISExposureLogging_IXP.purpose: Helps improve user experience by tracking how players interact with features.

FFlagMenuButtonsCheckVisibilityBeforeMou.mechanism: Checks if menu buttons should be visible before they are displayed.
FFlagMenuButtonsCheckVisibilityBeforeMou.purpose: Ensures that players only see relevant buttons, reducing clutter in the interface.

FFlagRemoveSystemErrorMessageLocalize.mechanism: Removes localization for system error messages in the game.
FFlagRemoveSystemErrorMessageLocalize.purpose: Players will see error messages in a consistent language without localization issues.

FFlagAXFixMaybePromptForR15ItemDataCheck.mechanism: Fixes a prompt that checks item data for R15 character models.
FFlagAXFixMaybePromptForR15ItemDataCheck.purpose: Players using R15 models will have a smoother experience with item checks.

FFlagLcFixComputeHsrVisibility.mechanism: Addresses visibility calculations for high-speed rendering.
FFlagLcFixComputeHsrVisibility.purpose: Players will experience better visual performance and clarity in fast-paced scenarios.

DFFlagHttpMsxmlCheckPendingWake_Staged.mechanism: Implements a staged check for pending HTTP requests.
DFFlagHttpMsxmlCheckPendingWake_Staged.purpose: Players will experience fewer interruptions due to pending network requests.

DFIntDoNotResumeTooHardHundredthsPercent.mechanism: Adjusts the percentage threshold for resuming game sessions.
DFIntDoNotResumeTooHardHundredthsPercent.purpose: Players will have a more forgiving experience when resuming games after interruptions.

DFIntJoinLimitWin32x64.mechanism: Sets a limit on the number of players joining a game on 64-bit Windows systems.
DFIntJoinLimitWin32x64.purpose: Improves game stability by preventing too many players from joining at once.

FFlagCustomizedDefaultInstancesFlag2.mechanism: Allows developers to customize default game objects and instances.
FFlagCustomizedDefaultInstancesFlag2.purpose: Gives players a more personalized and unique gaming experience.

FFlagMakeupDontComposeSingleMakeupAsset_.mechanism: Changes how makeup assets are combined in character customization.
FFlagMakeupDontComposeSingleMakeupAsset_.purpose: Enhances character appearance options by allowing more flexibility in makeup choices.

FFlagUsePrefetchedCredProtocolIsAvailabl.mechanism: Implements a protocol for prefetching credentials during user sign-up.
FFlagUsePrefetchedCredProtocolIsAvailabl.purpose: Speeds up the sign-up process for new players, making it easier to get started.

DFFlagEnableRunServiceProperty_Staged.mechanism: Introduces a new property for the RunService that developers can use.
DFFlagEnableRunServiceProperty_Staged.purpose: Improves game performance and allows for smoother gameplay experiences.

FFlagRefactorShouldRunAdService_Staged.mechanism: Enables a new version of the advertisement service for testing.
FFlagRefactorShouldRunAdService_Staged.purpose: Improves ad performance and reliability for players.

FFlagAXRootSlotBasedEditorFlag8.mechanism: Introduces a new editing interface based on slots for better organization.
FFlagAXRootSlotBasedEditorFlag8.purpose: Makes it easier for developers to manage game elements, leading to better games for players.

FFlagAXIncreaseDefaultPeekViewHeight_IXP.mechanism: Adjusts the default height of the preview window in the editor.
FFlagAXIncreaseDefaultPeekViewHeight_IXP.purpose: Provides a better view of game elements, improving the development experience.

FFlagDontAssertOnUserIDInCaptureMetadata.mechanism: Removes checks related to user IDs in data capture processes.
FFlagDontAssertOnUserIDInCaptureMetadata.purpose: Reduces errors during data collection, leading to a more seamless experience for players.

FIntHelpPageThrottleHundredthsPercent_IX.mechanism: Limits the frequency of help page requests to reduce server load.
FIntHelpPageThrottleHundredthsPercent_IX.purpose: Improves the performance and responsiveness of help pages for players.

FFlagFixPeoplePageCardTooltip.mechanism: Corrects the display of tooltips on the People page.
FFlagFixPeoplePageCardTooltip.purpose: Enhances user experience by providing accurate information when hovering over player cards.

DFFlagSimOptimizeHumanoidPlayer.mechanism: Optimizes the simulation of humanoid characters for better performance.
DFFlagSimOptimizeHumanoidPlayer.purpose: Reduces lag and improves gameplay smoothness for players controlling humanoid characters.
